name: naviproxy
description: A lightweight dashboard and reverse proxy gateway for homelabs.
author: Alexander-Hung

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @naviproxy/api" "npm run dev -w @naviproxy/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @naviproxy/api && npm run build -w @naviproxy/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @naviproxy/api && npm run lint -w @naviproxy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @naviproxy/api && npm run typecheck -w @naviproxy/web
